title: The Incident Response Process
description: Understand the lifecycle of responding to a security incident.

body.raw:
## The Incident Response Process

This tutorial will cover the phases of incident response: Preparation, Identification, Containment, Eradication, Recovery, and Lessons Learned. Content to be added.
